name: chain_i_built_31_n8n_workflows_this_month_that
method:
i built 31 n8n workflows this month that replace
the most overpriced saas tools businesses pay for.

→ $299/mo email marketing platform — replaced
→ $199/mo social scheduling tool — replaced
→ $149/mo

stages.task: scan G2/Capterra for SaaS tools with highest pricing complaints and identify n8n-replaceable features
build n8n workflows via API at localhost:5678 that replicate each target SaaS core features
bundle each workflow with setup guide, screenshots, and listing copy priced at $29-79 each or $149 bundle
create content (4 threads, 12 tweets), list products, send cold emails to businesses paying for replaced SaaS
